TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == tu sep tu lim mihcaan cay tu bulad miliwliw mikunglin ku hitay 2025ŚĻī12śúąÁíįŚŹįŤĽćšļčśľĒÁ∑ī == tu sep tu lim mihcaan cay tu bulsd miliwliw mikunglin ku hitay, banggu u " cen-yi-se-mi-2025", u Cung-kuo-zen-min hitay itida i walian nu sakalepacawan a kitdaan, itida i tu sep tu lim mihcaan cay tu bulad lu siw demiad katukuh lu cay demiad, misakaput tu sakalepacaw nu kitidaan lukung, kayngung, kungung atu silamalay lacu nu hitay itida i liwliw nu Taywan a minanam mikunglin. pacakat tu nipikunglingan, ina hitay u muktiki sapisuayaw tu " tay-tu-fen-lei-se-li" sayaway a misuayaw tu " sakay hekal nu pilawilawan" a wayway nu hitay, namakayda tu i tu sep tu tu mihcaan tawya nu Amilika Cung-yi-yen ci pei-luo-si nikataynian i Taywan, makaala tu tuluay nu mihcaan misuayaw henay tu Taywan a mikuwang atu nu micapiay tu bayu nu mi'disay a waywayan. 2025ŚĻī12 . Cung-Dipun kalawlawan tu sakayhekal šł≠śó•Ś§Ėšļ§ťĘ®ś≥Ę tu sep tu lim mihcaan cay cay bulad pic demiad, baluhay nu sakakaay nu Dipun ci Kaw-se-caw-meiw sakamusa " idaw ku kawaw nu Taywan" hakiya malaDipun nu " katibahawan tu patay maudip", makaylalabu nu balucu ku Ce-wi-tuy midebung tu Taywan, mahiniay a nakamuan miduduc tu naayaway nu sakakaay ci An-pei-cin-san " sikawaw ku Taywan sikawaway tu ku Dipun sa". musakamu ci Kaw-se misababelihbelih ku Cung-kuo, hinisa ku sakayhekalan nu sakakaay acaay tu ci Kaw-se kakapah sa, saan patahkal nu sasakamuen ku Cung-kuo kaygung itida nu hung-bayu tu nipinanam. cay tu bulad, dayhiw nu Cung-kuo ci Hu-cung patigami tu Lein-he-kuo tu mIsuan, amana kacaay palutatengan tu mahiniay nu kawaw, u yusang nu Dipun " cay lu nikacunusan" macakat tu cay lu mihcaan, misumad tu sakatusa nanikalepacawan tuni kahatida nu tenes tu " sakatahekal tu sakalepacawan nu duguan tu tuluay nu kasipucan", mihang patahekal tu sakalepacawan nu duguan, mihaymaw misumad " inai'ay nu He tulu ku lalahecian" pacumud tu He-ce duguan, mahiniay nu waywayan nanutawyatu mikikaka tu sasakamuen a sananay nu kamuan " sapidiputaw", sakadungah nu sapidiputaw" nu lalabu, u " mikibaluhay tu sakayhekal" nu wayway. 12śúąŚąĚ, "ÁöĄŤ°®ÁŹĺ. Amilika pacakay i Taywan tu satabakiay nu hitayan nu lalacuan ÁĺéŚúčŚįćŚŹįśúÄŚ§ßŤĽćŚĒģ cay tu bulad cay pic demiad, saan ku Amilika nu Kuo-hng-pu an-cin-ci, Amilika pacakay i Taywan tu sayaway nu sakayhitay nu duguan cay cay cay yi nu Amilika a kalisiwan, u satabakiay nu nipicakayan tu likisian. tawya tu nu buladan mikisa ci Cung-tung Lay-cin-de tu sakaylepacawan nu duguan saan ita u Taywan amisaicelang micunus tu sakay hitayan nu ditekan, misangan tu " sapiputaw tu namakahekalay nu mi'disay", mahini kya taneng mihusiw tu sakalihalay, saan nai' henay ku laheci nu Cung-kuo midebung tu Taywan, sapicunus tu icelang nu hitay sapatalaw tu Cung-kuo. mahiniay nu kawawan misababelibelih ku Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo, saan micidek ku nipisabelibelihan. duma satu, ina sapatahekal u masasukamuay henay tu kalisiw, mahiniay nu kawaw u sapiedisaw nu kalisiwan. 12śúą17śó•, . cay tu bulad tu wal demiad, pikunglingan tu nacil a aliwac, Tay-pei seciw ci Cein-wang-an tayda i Sang-hay mikaygi, mananukas tu taluma'. hadek namusakamu, sakamusa ku hitay nu Ta-lu tu sapikunglin nu sasakamuen. Cung-kun-cung-yen itini i Taywanay, Kuo-tay-pan musakamuay ci Cen-pin-haw itini i singbungkisa saan, "cen-yi-se-min 2025" miisiw misuayaw tu " Tay-du" mamikakenis satu tademaw atu sakay hekal nu nipikuwan a nipihaceng nu nipisakamuan. maynah henay ci Lay-cin-dean " misatay-tu" mikakenih tu kawaw, pacakay tu kanatal, misakadihi tu sakaudip nu Taywan nikalalekalan atu sakakapah nu nikaudipan, mipulung tu duma nu kanatal "misacidek" mipaculi, palekal tu kalepacaw, micidek ku nipipalula'cus tina tusaay nu kanatalan. Cung-kuo mihantay tu hekalay nu icelang tu caayay kaw tatengaay midebung tu Taywan nu kawawan, milawlaw tu lalabu nu Cung-kuo. . sihu nu Cung-haw-min-kuo šł≠ŤŹĮśįĎŚúčśĒŅŚļú saan ci Cung-tun Lay-cin-de tina nikasumadan nu sakaysuayaw, amana ka tibahaw ku balucu', " caay kami pitalakaw tu sakaalasias, caay kami pidademec, paayaw kami pacukel tu kanatal nu ancin atu sakalihalay a nikaudipan." musakamuay nu Cung-tung-hu saan ci Kuo-ya-huy micili tu Cung-kuo mabulibul sat u In-Tay niyaduan tu nikasasungaayan, saan setupen ku nipinanam nu hitay atu mibulibul. .
S.PHON: == tu s…ôp tu r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan ¶aj tu bur~…ĺad mir~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw mikuŇčr~…ĺin ku ńßitaj ************** == tu s…ôp tu r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan ¶aj tu bur~…ĺsd mir~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw mikuŇčr~…ĺin ku ńßitaj, baŇčgu u " ¶…ôn-ji-s…ô-mi-****", u ¶uŇč-kuo-z…ôn-min ńßitaj itida i war~…ĺian nu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan a kitdaan, itida i tu s…ôp tu r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan ¶aj tu bur~…ĺad r~…ĺu siw d…ômiad katukuńß r~…ĺu ¶aj d…ômiad, misakaput tu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw nu kitidaan r~…ĺukuŇč, kajŇčuŇč, kuŇčuŇč atu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj r~…ĺa ¶u nu ńßitaj itida i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu tajwan a minanam mikuŇčr~…ĺin. pa ¶akat tu nipikuŇčr~…ĺiŇčan, ina ńßitaj u muktiki sapisuajaw tu " taj-tu-f…ôn-r~…ĺ…ôi-s…ô-r~…ĺi" sajawaj a misuajaw tu " sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu pir~…ĺawir~…ĺawan" a wajwaj nu ńßitaj, namakajda tu i tu s…ôp tu tu mińß ¶aan tawja nu amir~…ĺika ¶uŇč-ji-j…ôn ¶i p…ôi-r~…ĺuo-si nikatajnian i tajwan, makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺuaj nu mińß ¶aan misuajaw ńß…ônaj tu tajwan a mikuwaŇč atu nu mi ¶apiaj tu baju nu mi Ē~ °disaj a wajwajan. ******* . ¶uŇč-dipun kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan tu sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺ ****** tu s…ôp tu r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan ¶aj ¶aj bur~…ĺad pi ¶ d…ômiad, bar~…ĺuńßaj nu sakakaaj nu dipun ¶i kaw-s…ô- ¶aw-m…ôiw sakamusa " idaw ku kawaw nu tajwan" ńßakija mar~…ĺadipun nu " katibańßawan tu pataj maudip", makajr~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu bar~…ĺu ¶u ku ¶…ô-wi-tuj mid…ôbuŇč tu tajwan, mańßiniaj a nakamuan midudu ¶ tu naajawaj nu sakakaaj ¶i an-p…ôi- ¶in-san " sikawaw ku tajwan sikawawaj tu ku dipun sa". musakamu ¶i kaw-s…ô misabab…ôr~…ĺińßb…ôr~…ĺińß ku ¶uŇč-kuo, ńßinisa ku sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺan nu sakakaaj a ¶aaj tu ¶i kaw-s…ô kakapańß sa, saan patańßkar~…ĺ nu sasakamu…ôn ku ¶uŇč-kuo kajguŇč itida nu ńßuŇč-baju tu nipinanam. ¶aj tu bur~…ĺad, dajńßiw nu ¶uŇč-kuo ¶i ńßu- ¶uŇč patigami tu r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kuo tu misuan, amana ka ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu mańßiniaj nu kawaw, u jusaŇč nu dipun " ¶aj r~…ĺu nika ¶unusan" ma ¶akat tu ¶aj r~…ĺu mińß ¶aan, misumad tu sakatusa nanikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan tuni kańßatida nu t…ôn…ôs tu " sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu duguan tu tur~…ĺuaj nu kasipu ¶an", mińßaŇč patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu duguan, mińßajmaw misumad " inai Ē~ °aj nu ńß…ô tur~…ĺu ku r~…ĺar~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian" pa ¶umud tu ńß…ô- ¶…ô duguan, mańßiniaj nu wajwajan nanutawjatu mikikaka tu sasakamu…ôn a sananaj nu kamuan " sapidiputaw", sakaduŇčańß nu sapidiputaw" nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu, u " mikibar~…ĺuńßaj tu sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺ" nu wajwaj. ****, "***. amir~…ĺika pa ¶akaj i tajwan tu satabakiaj nu ńßitajan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶uan ******** ¶aj tu bur~…ĺad ¶aj pi ¶ d…ômiad, saan ku amir~…ĺika nu kuo-ńßŇč-pu an- ¶in- ¶i, amir~…ĺika pa ¶akaj i tajwan tu sajawaj nu sakajńßitaj nu duguan ¶aj ¶aj ¶aj ji nu amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiwan, u satabakiaj nu nipi ¶akajan tu r~…ĺikisian. tawja tu nu bur~…ĺadan mikisa ¶i ¶uŇč-tuŇč r~…ĺaj- ¶in-d…ô tu sakajr~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu duguan saan ita u tajwan amisai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč mi ¶unus tu sakaj ńßitajan nu dit…ôkan, misaŇčan tu " sapiputaw tu namakańß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu mi Ē~ °disaj", mańßini kja tan…ôŇč mińßusiw tu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj, saan nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i nu ¶uŇč-kuo mid…ôbuŇč tu tajwan, sapi ¶unus tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu ńßitaj sapatar~…ĺaw tu ¶uŇč-kuo. mańßiniaj nu kawawan misabab…ôr~…ĺib…ôr~…ĺińß ku ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo, saan mi ¶id…ôk ku nipisab…ôr~…ĺib…ôr~…ĺińßan. duma satu, ina sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ u masasukamuaj ńß…ônaj tu kar~…ĺisiw, mańßiniaj nu kawaw u sapi…ôdisaw nu kar~…ĺisiwan. ******, . ¶aj tu bur~…ĺad tu war~…ĺ d…ômiad, pikuŇčr~…ĺiŇčan tu na ¶ir~…ĺ a ar~…ĺiwa ¶, taj-p…ôi s…ô ¶iw ¶i ¶…ôin-waŇč-an tajda i saŇč-ńßaj mikajgi, mananukas tu tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ńßad…ôk namusakamu, sakamusa ku ńßitaj nu ta-r~…ĺu tu sapikuŇčr~…ĺin nu sasakamu…ôn. ¶uŇč-kun- ¶uŇč-j…ôn itini i tajwanaj, kuo-taj-pan musakamuaj ¶i ¶…ôn-pin-ńßaw itini i siŇčbuŇčkisa saan, " ¶…ôn-ji-s…ô-min ****" miisiw misuajaw tu " taj-du" mamikak…ônis satu tad…ômaw atu sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu nipikuwan a nipińßa ¶…ôŇč nu nipisakamuan. majnańß ńß…ônaj ¶i r~…ĺaj- ¶in-d…ôan " misataj-tu" mikak…ônińß tu kawaw, pa ¶akaj tu kanatar~…ĺ, misakadińßi tu sakaudip nu tajwan nikar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan atu sakakapańß nu nikaudipan, mipur~…ĺuŇč tu duma nu kanatar~…ĺ "misa ¶id…ôk" mipa ¶ur~…ĺi, par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, mi ¶id…ôk ku nipipar~…ĺur~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tina tusaaj nu kanatar~…ĺan. ¶uŇč-kuo mińßantaj tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu ¶aajaj kaw tat…ôŇčaaj mid…ôbuŇč tu tajwan nu kawawan, mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu ¶uŇč-kuo. . sińßu nu ¶uŇč-ńßaw-min-kuo ****** saan ¶i ¶uŇč-tun r~…ĺaj- ¶in-d…ô tina nikasumadan nu sakajsuajaw, amana ka tibańßaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, " ¶aaj kami pitar~…ĺakaw tu sakaar~…ĺasias, ¶aaj kami pidad…ôm…ô ¶, paajaw kami pa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ tu kanatar~…ĺ nu an ¶in atu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a nikaudipan." musakamuaj nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč-ńßu saan ¶i kuo-ja-ńßuj mi ¶ir~…ĺi tu ¶uŇč-kuo mabur~…ĺibur~…ĺ sat u in-taj nijaduan tu nikasasuŇčaajan, saan s…ôtup…ôn ku nipinanam nu ńßitaj atu mibur~…ĺibur~…ĺ. .
S.FORM: == tu sep tu lim mihcaan cay tu bulad miliwliw mikunglin ku hitay 2025ŚĻī12śúąÁíįŚŹįŤĽćšļčśľĒÁ∑ī == tu sep tu lim mihcaan cay tu bulsd miliwliw mikunglin ku hitay, banggu u " cen-yi-se-mi-2025", u Cung-kuo-zen-min hitay itida i walian nu sakalepacawan a kitdaan, itida i tu sep tu lim mihcaan cay tu bulad lu siw demiad katukuh lu cay demiad, misakaput tu sakalepacaw nu kitidaan lukung, kayngung, kungung atu silamalay lacu nu hitay itida i liwliw nu Taywan a minanam mikunglin. pacakat tu nipikunglingan, ina hitay u muktiki sapisuayaw tu " tay-tu-fen-lei-se-li" sayaway a misuayaw tu " sakay hekal nu pilawilawan" a wayway nu hitay, namakayda tu i tu sep tu tu mihcaan tawya nu Amilika Cung-yi-yen ci pei-luo-si nikataynian i Taywan, makaala tu tuluay nu mihcaan misuayaw henay tu Taywan a mikuwang atu nu micapiay tu bayu nu mi'disay a waywayan. 2025ŚĻī12 . Cung-Dipun kalawlawan tu sakayhekal šł≠śó•Ś§Ėšļ§ťĘ®ś≥Ę tu sep tu lim mihcaan cay cay bulad pic demiad, baluhay nu sakakaay nu Dipun ci Kaw-se-caw-meiw sakamusa " idaw ku kawaw nu Taywan" hakiya malaDipun nu " katibahawan tu patay maudip", makaylalabu nu balucu ku Ce-wi-tuy midebung tu Taywan, mahiniay a nakamuan miduduc tu naayaway nu sakakaay ci An-pei-cin-san " sikawaw ku Taywan sikawaway tu ku Dipun sa". musakamu ci Kaw-se misababelihbelih ku Cung-kuo, hinisa ku sakayhekalan nu sakakaay acaay tu ci Kaw-se kakapah sa, saan patahkal nu sasakamuen ku Cung-kuo kaygung itida nu hung-bayu tu nipinanam. cay tu bulad, dayhiw nu Cung-kuo ci Hu-cung patigami tu Lein-he-kuo tu mIsuan, amana kacaay palutatengan tu mahiniay nu kawaw, u yusang nu Dipun " cay lu nikacunusan" macakat tu cay lu mihcaan, misumad tu sakatusa nanikalepacawan tuni kahatida nu tenes tu " sakatahekal tu sakalepacawan nu duguan tu tuluay nu kasipucan", mihang patahekal tu sakalepacawan nu duguan, mihaymaw misumad " inai'ay nu He tulu ku lalahecian" pacumud tu He-ce duguan, mahiniay nu waywayan nanutawyatu mikikaka tu sasakamuen a sananay nu kamuan " sapidiputaw", sakadungah nu sapidiputaw" nu lalabu, u " mikibaluhay tu sakayhekal" nu wayway. 12śúąŚąĚ, "ÁöĄŤ°®ÁŹĺ. Amilika pacakay i Taywan tu satabakiay nu hitayan nu lalacuan ÁĺéŚúčŚįćŚŹįśúÄŚ§ßŤĽćŚĒģ cay tu bulad cay pic demiad, saan ku Amilika nu Kuo-hng-pu an-cin-ci, Amilika pacakay i Taywan tu sayaway nu sakayhitay nu duguan cay cay cay yi nu Amilika a kalisiwan, u satabakiay nu nipicakayan tu likisian. tawya tu nu buladan mikisa ci Cung-tung Lay-cin-de tu sakaylepacawan nu duguan saan ita u Taywan amisaicelang micunus tu sakay hitayan nu ditekan, misangan tu " sapiputaw tu namakahekalay nu mi'disay", mahini kya taneng mihusiw tu sakalihalay, saan nai' henay ku laheci nu Cung-kuo midebung tu Taywan, sapicunus tu icelang nu hitay sapatalaw tu Cung-kuo. mahiniay nu kawawan misababelibelih ku Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo, saan micidek ku nipisabelibelihan. duma satu, ina sapatahekal u masasukamuay henay tu kalisiw, mahiniay nu kawaw u sapiedisaw nu kalisiwan. 12śúą17śó•, . cay tu bulad tu wal demiad, pikunglingan tu nacil a aliwac, Tay-pei seciw ci Cein-wang-an tayda i Sang-hay mikaygi, mananukas tu taluma'. hadek namusakamu, sakamusa ku hitay nu Ta-lu tu sapikunglin nu sasakamuen. Cung-kun-cung-yen itini i Taywanay, Kuo-tay-pan musakamuay ci Cen-pin-haw itini i singbungkisa saan, "cen-yi-se-min 2025" miisiw misuayaw tu " Tay-du" mamikakenis satu tademaw atu sakay hekal nu nipikuwan a nipihaceng nu nipisakamuan. maynah henay ci Lay-cin-dean " misatay-tu" mikakenih tu kawaw, pacakay tu kanatal, misakadihi tu sakaudip nu Taywan nikalalekalan atu sakakapah nu nikaudipan, mipulung tu duma nu kanatal "misacidek" mipaculi, palekal tu kalepacaw, micidek ku nipipalula'cus tina tusaay nu kanatalan. Cung-kuo mihantay tu hekalay nu icelang tu caayay kaw tatengaay midebung tu Taywan nu kawawan, milawlaw tu lalabu nu Cung-kuo. . sihu nu Cung-haw-min-kuo šł≠ŤŹĮśįĎŚúčśĒŅŚļú saan ci Cung-tun Lay-cin-de tina nikasumadan nu sakaysuayaw, amana ka tibahaw ku balucu', " caay kami pitalakaw tu sakaalasias, caay kami pidademec, paayaw kami pacukel tu kanatal nu ancin atu sakalihalay a nikaudipan." musakamuay nu Cung-tung-hu saan ci Kuo-ya-huy micili tu Cung-kuo mabulibul sat u In-Tay niyaduan tu nikasasungaayan, saan setupen ku nipinanam nu hitay atu mibulibul. .

nipikuŇčr~…ĺiŇčan, ina ńßitaj u muktiki sapisuajaw tu " taj-tu-f…ôn-r~…ĺ…ôi-s…ô-r~…ĺi" sajawaj a misuajaw tu " sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu pir~…ĺawir~…ĺawan" a wajwaj nu ńßitaj, namakajda tu i tu s…ôp tu tu mińß ¶aan tawja nu amir~…ĺika ¶uŇč-ji-j…ôn ¶i p…ôi-r~…ĺuo-si nikatajnian i tajwan, makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺuaj nu mińß ¶aan misuajaw ńß…ônaj tu tajwan a mikuwaŇč atu nu mi ¶apiaj tu baju nu mi Ē~ °disaj a wajwajan. ******* . ¶uŇč-dipun kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan tu sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺ ****** tu s…ôp tu r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan ¶aj ¶aj bur~…ĺad pi ¶ d…ômiad, bar~…ĺuńßaj nu sakakaaj nu dipun ¶i kaw-s…ô- ¶aw-m…ôiw sakamusa " idaw ku kawaw nu tajwan" ńßakija mar~…ĺadipun nu " katibańßawan tu pataj maudip", makajr~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu bar~…ĺu ¶u ku ¶…ô-wi-tuj mid…ôbuŇč tu tajwan, mańßiniaj a nakamuan midudu ¶ tu naajawaj nu sakakaaj ¶i an-p…ôi- ¶in-san " sikawaw ku tajwan sikawawaj tu ku dipun sa". musakamu ¶i kaw-s…ô misabab…ôr~…ĺińßb…ôr~…ĺińß ku ¶uŇč-kuo, ńßinisa ku sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺan nu sakakaaj a ¶aaj tu ¶i kaw-s…ô kakapańß sa, saan patańßkar~…ĺ nu sasakamu…ôn ku ¶uŇč-kuo kajguŇč itida nu ńßuŇč-baju tu nipinanam. ¶aj tu bur~…ĺad, dajńßiw nu ¶uŇč-kuo ¶i ńßu- ¶uŇč patigami tu r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kuo tu misuan, amana ka ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu mańßiniaj nu kawaw, u jusaŇč nu dipun " ¶aj r~…ĺu nika ¶unusan" ma ¶akat tu ¶aj r~…ĺu mińß ¶aan, misumad tu sakatusa nanikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan tuni kańßatida nu t…ôn…ôs tu " sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu duguan tu tur~…ĺuaj nu kasipu ¶an", mińßaŇč patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu duguan, mińßajmaw misumad " inai Ē~ °aj nu ńß…ô tur~…ĺu ku r~…ĺar~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian" pa ¶umud tu ńß…ô- ¶…ô duguan, mańßiniaj nu wajwajan nanutawjatu mikikaka tu sasakamu…ôn a sananaj nu kamuan " sapidiputaw", sakaduŇčańß nu sapidiputaw" nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu, u " mikibar~…ĺuńßaj tu sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺ" nu wajwaj. ****, "***. amir~…ĺika pa ¶akaj i tajwan tu satabakiaj nu ńßitajan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶uan ******** ¶aj tu bur~…ĺad ¶aj pi ¶ d…ômiad, saan ku amir~…ĺika nu kuo-ńßŇč-pu an- ¶in- ¶i, amir~…ĺika pa ¶akaj i tajwan tu sajawaj nu sakajńßitaj nu duguan ¶aj ¶aj ¶aj ji nu amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiwan, u satabakiaj nu nipi ¶akajan tu r~…ĺikisian. tawja tu nu bur~…ĺadan mikisa ¶i ¶uŇč-tuŇč r~…ĺaj- ¶in-d…ô tu sakajr~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu duguan saan ita u tajwan amisai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč mi ¶unus tu sakaj ńßitajan nu dit…ôkan, misaŇčan tu " sapiputaw tu namakańß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu mi Ē~ °disaj", mańßini kja tan…ôŇč mińßusiw tu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj, saan nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i nu ¶uŇč-kuo mid…ôbuŇč tu tajwan, sapi ¶unus tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu ńßitaj sapatar~…ĺaw tu ¶uŇč-kuo. mańßiniaj nu kawawan misabab…ôr~…ĺib…ôr~…ĺińß ku ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo, saan mi ¶id…ôk ku nipisab…ôr~…ĺib…ôr~…ĺińßan. duma satu, ina sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ u masasukamuaj ńß…ônaj tu kar~…ĺisiw, mańßiniaj nu kawaw u sapi…ôdisaw nu kar~…ĺisiwan. ******, . ¶aj tu bur~…ĺad tu war~…ĺ d…ômiad, pikuŇčr~…ĺiŇčan tu na ¶ir~…ĺ a ar~…ĺiwa ¶, taj-p…ôi s…ô ¶iw ¶i ¶…ôin-waŇč-an tajda i saŇč-ńßaj mikajgi, mananukas tu tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ńßad…ôk namusakamu, sakamusa ku ńßitaj nu ta-r~…ĺu tu sapikuŇčr~…ĺin nu sasakamu…ôn. ¶uŇč-kun- ¶uŇč-j…ôn itini i tajwanaj, kuo-taj-pan musakamuaj ¶i ¶…ôn-pin-ńßaw itini i siŇčbuŇčkisa saan, " ¶…ôn-ji-s…ô-min ****" miisiw misuajaw tu " taj-du" mamikak…ônis satu tad…ômaw atu sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu nipikuwan a nipińßa ¶…ôŇč nu nipisakamuan. majnańß ńß…ônaj ¶i r~…ĺaj- ¶in-d…ôan " misataj-tu" mikak…ônińß tu kawaw, pa ¶akaj tu kanatar~…ĺ, misakadińßi tu sakaudip nu tajwan nikar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan atu sakakapańß nu nikaudipan, mipur~…ĺuŇč tu duma nu kanatar~…ĺ "misa ¶id…ôk" mipa ¶ur~…ĺi, par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, mi ¶id…ôk ku nipipar~…ĺur~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tina tusaaj nu kanatar~…ĺan. ¶uŇč-kuo mińßantaj tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu ¶aajaj kaw tat…ôŇčaaj mid…ôbuŇč tu tajwan nu kawawan, mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu ¶uŇč-kuo. . sińßu nu ¶uŇč-ńßaw-min-kuo ****** saan ¶i ¶uŇč-tun r~…ĺaj- ¶in-d…ô tina nikasumadan nu sakajsuajaw, amana ka tibańßaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, " ¶aaj kami pitar~…ĺakaw tu sakaar~…ĺasias, ¶aaj kami pidad…ôm…ô ¶, paajaw kami pa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ tu kanatar~…ĺ nu an ¶in atu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a nikaudipan." musakamuaj nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč-ńßu saan ¶i kuo-ja-ńßuj mi ¶ir~…ĺi tu ¶uŇč-kuo mabur~…ĺibur~…ĺ sat u in-taj nijaduan tu nikasasuŇčaajan, saan s…ôtup…ôn ku nipinanam nu ńßitaj atu mibur~…ĺibur~…ĺ. .
